debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

proof:
constructor
  · rw [le_div_iff₀ (by positivity)]
    norm_cast
    rw [mul_comm, ← Nat.descFactorial_eq_factorial_mul_choose]
    exact Nat.descFactorial_le_pow n k
  · rcases n.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hn
    · cases k <;> simp
    refine div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by positivity) (by positivity) ?_
    norm_cast
    induction k with
    | zero => simp
    | succ k ih =>
      cases k with
      | zero => simp
      | succ k =>
        rw [Nat.succ_sub_one, Nat.factorial_succ, pow_succ, mul_comm]
        apply Nat.mul_le_mul (by omega)
        simpa using ih
